name: PureMD MCP Server
what_it_does: PureMD MCP server enabling AI agents to interact with PureMD — a Canadian electronic health record (EHR) and electronic medical record (EMR) system widely used in Canadian family medicine and primary care clinics. Enables reading patient records, scheduling appointments, accessing clinical notes, and integrating AI-assisted workflows into Canadian healthcare practices.
use_cases: Retrieving patient clinical summaries from healthcare AI agents
Scheduling and managing appointments from clinical workflow agents
Accessing medication lists and prescription history from pharmacy agents
Reading clinical notes and SOAP notes from documentation agents
Generating patient communication letters from clinical agents
Supporting clinical decision-making with patient history context from diagnostic agents
not_for: Non-PureMD EHR systems (this is PureMD-specific — use Epic, Cerner, or FHIR MCPs for other systems)
Non-Canadian healthcare settings where PureMD is not used
Any use without explicit healthcare compliance review and patient consent
best_when: A Canadian family medicine or primary care clinic using PureMD needs AI-assisted clinical workflows — appointment management, note generation, or clinical data access with full PIPEDA/PHIPA compliance.
avoid_when: You use a different EHR system, operate outside Canada, or haven't completed a healthcare AI compliance review for your jurisdiction.

auth.notes: PureMD API credentials required. Must obtain API access from PureMD. Authentication details clinic-specific. Patient data access requires healthcare-grade credential management.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — PureMD is a paid EHR subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: PureMD subscription pricing for clinics; API access requires separate arrangement
pricing.notes: PureMD subscription required. API access for AI integration may require additional agreement with PureMD. MCP server open source if available.

performance.rate_limits: PureMD API: rate limits apply; check with PureMD for current API quotas

known_agent_gotchas: CRITICAL: Patient health data — highest sensitivity category; requires PIPEDA/PHIPA compliance review before deployment
AI clinical decision support requires physician oversight — never allow autonomous AI clinical decisions
Canadian healthcare data must remain in Canada (PIPEDA data residency) — verify cloud deployment complies
Patient consent for AI involvement in care may be required under provincial regulations
PureMD API access may require direct arrangement with PureMD vendor — not self-serve
Audit logging of all patient data access is required under Canadian health privacy law
agent_readiness.security_notes: CRITICAL: PHI/EHR data — most sensitive category. PIPEDA/PHIPA compliance mandatory. Data must stay in Canada. TLS required. Full audit logging of all access. Physician oversight required for AI clinical functions. Never expose patient data to general-purpose LLMs without appropriate data processing agreements.

security_score_components.security_notes: PHI/EHR — extreme sensitivity. PIPEDA/PHIPA compliance required. Canada data residency. Full audit trail. DPA with AI vendor required. Physician oversight mandatory.
